Understand gravitational fields as force per unit mass fields
Understand Doppler effect for moving sound source relative to stationary observer.
Electromagnetic waves are transverse and travel at constant speed in free space
Perpendicular constant force causes centripetal acceleration in circular motion

Define radians and express angular displacement using radian measure
Quarks are fundamental particles; six flavour types exist with specific names.

Interpret alpha scattering results to deduce nucleus existence and size

Recall and apply the diffraction grating equation d sin θ = nλ

Define potential difference as energy transferred per unit charge across components.
Define what resistance is in electrical circuits
Physical quantities comprise numerical magnitude and corresponding unit.
